name: build-a-baller
description: Build-A-Baller — spin NBA players' attributes into your own created baller.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.start: NODE_ENV=production CLIENT_DIST=client/dist npm --prefix server run start
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
